title: 🧠 Graph Chaos (Random Network Dynamics)
name: Graph Chaos (Random Network Dynamics)
what_it_is: Chaos on graph structures—nodes and edges where system evolution creates nontrivial topology (e.g., social dynamics, neural nets).
how_to_use: her aura pulses with graph chaos—threads of connection twitching with unstable energy
the field maps his neural graph—nodes of thought blinking in chaotic constellation
animation_behavior: Edges flicker in and out, new nodes form spontaneously, chaotic growth ---
